hero.caption: Spent on war since January 1, {year}
hero.methodology: Projected {year}, based on SIPRI {basedOnYear} actuals and a 5-year average growth rate. Actual figures are published annually in late April.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.counter: The counter projects this year's total global military spending based on the latest actual SIPRI figures multiplied by the 5-year average growth rate, then ticks in real time as a fraction of that yearly total based on seconds elapsed since January 1.
methodology.categories: Each humanitarian alternative is computed from authoritative sources (WHO, World Bank, UNICEF, Gavi, UN OCHA, UNESCO, IRENA, FAO). Cost units and citations are listed in each category's “see sources” panel.
methodology.data: All data is open and lives in the public repository.
methodology.repoLabel: View data and source code on GitHub
